task_completion.description: Verify that the required clients were created in OrangeHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrangeHRM 'Customers' list (typically under Time -> Project Info -> Customers) showing 'Riverside Community Foundation' and 'Metro School District'.

task_completion.description: Verify that the required projects were created and assigned to the correct clients in OrangeHRM.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrangeHRM 'Projects' list showing 'After-School Program Expansion' (assigned to Riverside Community Foundation) and 'Digital Literacy Initiative' (assigned to Metro School District).

task_completion.description: Verify that the required project activities were created for the respective projects.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the project details or activities list in OrangeHRM showing 'Program Planning' and 'Community Outreach' under the 'After-School Program Expansion' project, and 'Curriculum Development' and 'Instructor Training' under the 'Digital Literacy Initiative' project.

task_completion.description: Verify that a timesheet was submitted for Michael Thompson for the specified week.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrangeHRM Timesheet view for Michael Thompson (EMP005) for the week of April 7-11, 2025. It should show hours allocated to project activities and indicate that the timesheet has been saved or submitted.

task_completion.description: Verify that a timesheet was submitted for Kevin Hernandez for the specified week.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the OrangeHRM Timesheet view for Kevin Hernandez (EMP015) for the week of April 7-11, 2025. It should show hours allocated to project activities and indicate that the timesheet has been saved or submitted.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent used the OrangeHRM web interface to complete the task.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent is interacting with the OrangeHRM application in a web browser, rather than executing SQL queries, API scripts, or terminal commands to insert the data.

integrity.description: Ensure the agent navigated the OrangeHRM menus to enter the data.
integrity.visual_evidence: Verify that the screenshots show the agent actively using the OrangeHRM forms (e.g., Add Customer, Add Project, Timesheet entry) rather than just reading the brief file.

integrity.description: Ensure the timesheets were genuinely filled out in the system.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the timesheet entries are within the actual OrangeHRM timesheet grid and not typed into a text editor or mocked interface.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Clients to create: 'Riverside Community Foundation', 'Metro School District'. Projects: 'After-School Program Expansion' (Client: Riverside Community Foundation), 'Digital Literacy Initiative' (Client: Metro School District). Activities: 'Program Planning' and 'Community Outreach' for After-School Program Expansion; 'Curriculum Development' and 'Instructor Training' for Digital Literacy Initiative. Timesheets must be submitted for the week of April 7-11, 2025, for employees Michael Thompson (EMP005) and Kevin Hernandez (EMP015).
